title: backend: Config: Add a testcase for Headlamp kubeconfig paths
author: nikunjkumar05

findings.description: PR title/commit subject ends with a trailing period; remove it. Also 'testcase' should be two words: 'test case'.
PR body references '#NAN' as issue; add a real issue reference or note this is a standalone improvement.
Replacing HasPrefix with exact path equality documents and enforces the OS-specific kubeconfig directory layout.
